What Your Neighbors Have to Say

Read More Reviews →
M
Maria S.

Texas Roofing Pros did an amazing job installing new vinyl siding on my Arlington home! The crew was professional, efficient, and the siding looks fantastic. They even cleaned up thoroughly afterward. Highly recommend!

D
David B.

I had some storm damage to my siding in North Arlington. Texas Roofing Pros came out quickly and repaired it seamlessly. The price was fair, and the work was top-notch.

J
Jennifer K.

We chose fiber cement siding for its durability and fire resistance. Texas Roofing Pros did a fantastic job with the installation. The crew was professional, and the finished product is beautiful.

R
Robert L.

We replaced our old siding with insulated siding, and we've already noticed a difference in our energy bills. Texas Roofing Pros did a great job with the installation. They were professional, courteous, and efficient.

Texas Roofing Pros — Certified Professionals

Our team brings certified expertise and years of experience to every siding installer project. We stand behind our work with comprehensive warranties and a commitment to quality.

More About Us →

The Texas Roofing Pros Way

Our proven process ensures every project is completed with precision, transparency, and care.

1

Consultation

We start with a thorough, no-obligation assessment. Our certified team evaluates your needs and provides a detailed report with recommendations.

2

Plan & Prepare

We work with you to determine the best approach for your specific siding installer needs. Our experts ensure the right plan for quality results.

3

Get It Done

Our skilled team gets to work with precision and efficiency. We maintain a clean, organized environment and keep you informed every step of the way.

4

Quality Check

Before we consider any job complete, our team performs a comprehensive quality review. We verify every detail meets our exacting standards.

5

Wrap Up

Transparent pricing with no surprises. You only pay when you're 100% satisfied with the work. We offer flexible options to make the process seamless.

Proudly Serving Arlington & Beyond

As a locally owned and operated company, we're proud to serve customers throughout Arlington, TX and the surrounding communities. Our team brings local expertise and dedication to every project.

Dallas Fort Worth Plano Frisco McKinney Arlington Garland Irving
Let's Get Started →

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our siding installer services.

How long does vinyl siding installation take?

Installation time depends on the size and complexity of the project, but most vinyl siding installations are completed within a few days.

Is vinyl siding energy efficient?

Yes, vinyl siding can improve your home's energy efficiency by providing an extra layer of insulation, reducing heat loss in the winter and heat gain in the summer.

How do I clean my vinyl siding?

Vinyl siding can be easily cleaned with a soft brush or cloth and a mild detergent. Avoid using harsh chemicals or abrasive cleaners, as they can damage the siding.

Built on Arlington Values

Get a free, no-obligation siding consultation and discover the difference quality makes.
